title: IngameIME-PVP
description: Use InputMethod in Full screen Minecraft for 1.8.9
body:
# IngameIME for 1.8.9

![Icon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Live-Block/IngameIME-PVP/refs/heads/Mixin/docs/IngameIME-Icon.png)

Use `InputMethod` in **Full screen** Minecraft!

## Preview

### Window Mode

> This style is the same with Full screen Mode

### Full screen Mode

![Full screen Mode](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Live-Block/IngameIME-PVP/refs/heads/Mixin/docs/FullScreen-Mode.gif)

## Special Thanks

- [Windmill-City](https://github.com/Windmill-City): Mod founder

## Supported Platforms

| Platform | Supported |
| -------- | --------- |
| Windows  | √         |
| Linux    | ×         |
| MacOS    | ×         |
